query:
SELECT id, JSON_EXTRACT(physics_analysis, '$.quantitativeMode') as quantitative_mode_value,
  physics_analysis LIKE '%quantitativeMode":true%' as has_quantitative_mode_string
FROM ai_assessments 
WHERE physics_analysis IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 5;

  physics_analysis LIKE '%quantitativeMode":true%' as has_quantitative_mode_string
